plugins\/Nut_free\/plugin_info\/configur.Facteur multiplicateur des cycles intern: Multiplier factor for internal daemon cycles (Main=2s / Comm=1s / Event=1s). Does not affect NUT polling or status monitoring. Default = Normal (x1)
plugins\/Nut_free\/plugin_info\/configur.Intervalle en secondes de la surveillanc: Interval in seconds for ups.status monitoring (power failure detection). Default = 5. Automatically reduced to 2s if the UPS is running on battery power.
plugins\/Nut_free\/plugin_info\/configur.Intervalle en secondes entre chaque inte: Interval in seconds between each complete UPS query (all metrics). Default = 60
